creator: lev@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello, olli.
You wrote 20 =EC=E0=FF 2012 =E3., 13:45:51:

oh> Maybe Lev can explain with a view words the build-outputs.mk
oh> changes or document those in the subversion Makefile so we can
oh> take care about this hacks in our next PR's ;)
 This is build-outputs.mk which allows to:

(1) build bindings with out-of-tree (system) SVN libraries.
(2) install bindings without builded in-tree SVN libraries.

 It is needed only for bindings, yes.

--=20
// Black Lion AKA Lev Serebryakov <lev@serebryakov.spb.ru>
